current_public_behavior.default_artifact_gate: finalRound, Balanced Squad, artifact formation, balanced trust mode, All countries, no locked/removed players, no price filters, no risk controls

audited_blocks.reason: Read-only wrapper access and artifact schema checks are pure public contract logic.

audited_blocks.decision: helper wrapper now derives eligible keys from fixture authority

audited_blocks.decision: schema/shape validation moved; DOM-independent gate remains in script.js

It mixes active-stage filtering, locks, avoids, price filters, trust modes, risk controls, and ranking fallback.

The logic controls legal squad selection and starter composition.

risk_findings.hidden_fallback_context: The browser optimizer still exists for non-default inputs. Active eligible-team and projection gates reduce leakage risk, but a future pass should replace fallback selection with shared artifact/model logic.
risk_findings.safest_extraction_now: Move public artifact validation, fixture-authority eligible-team helpers, count summaries, labels, and generated-artifact explanation copy into a small helper layer loaded before script.js.

script_js_uses_helper_for: Final Round fixture-authority eligible team keys
